name: TodaysMoodCard
description: Card with mood emoji selector (5 emojis) and note input field for logging today's mood

name: MoodEmoji
description: Individual mood selection emoji button with selection state and animation

name: MoodTrendChart
description: Line chart card showing mood history with time range chips (1W/1M/All)

name: EnergyTrendChart
description: Line chart card showing energy history with time range chips (1W/1M/All)

name: WellnessTipCard
description: Expandable card showing wellness tips with animated expand/collapse and category badge

name: ChartChip
description: Time range selector chip used by trend charts for filtering time periods
